mapper.select:
SELECT cb.*, s.name AS student_name, t.name AS teacher_name, c.name AS course_name, cr.name AS classroom_name, sp.name AS package_name, sp.remaining_hours AS package_remaining_hours FROM course_booking cb LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON cb.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user t ON cb.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON cb.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN classroom cr ON cb.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN student_course_package sp ON cb.student_package_id = sp.id
AND cb.student_id = #{param.studentId} AND cb.teacher_id = #{param.teacherId} AND cb.status = #{param.status} AND cb.class_time >= CONCAT(#{param.dateFrom}, ' 00:00:00') AND cb.class_time <= CONCAT(#{param.dateTo}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN cb.class_time >= NOW() THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN cb.class_time >= NOW() THEN cb.class_time END ASC, CASE WHEN cb.class_time < NOW() THEN cb.class_time END DESC, cb.create_time DESC
ORDER BY cb.create_time DESC
SELECT status AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM course_booking GROUP BY status
